name: Chunky Chocolate Bars
recipeIngredient: 1 cup chilled unsalted butter, cut into pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a large bowl, whisk together flour and powdered sugar.
3. Add cocoa powder and mix until well combined.
4. Cut in the butter using your fingers or a knife until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
5. Press the mixture firmly into the bottom of a greased 9 by 13-inch pan.
6. Bake for 15 minutes, or until lightly golden.
7. Meanwhile, melt half of the chocolate chips and condensed milk in a heatproof bowl over a pot of simmering water (double boiler method).
8. Stir in vanilla extract and almond extract.
9. Pour the melted mixture evenly over the crust.
10. Sprinkle the remaining chocolate chips and chopped pecans on top.
11. Press down firmly to ensure even coverage.
12. Bake for an additional 20 minutes, or until set.
13. Remove from oven and let cool completely before cutting into bars.
